# G.A. Logix Software

> G.A. Logix is a Canadian software company based in Plessisville, Quebec, specializing in forestry operations management software.

## Products

- **ForestLogix**: Comprehensive forestry operations management platform available on Windows desktop, Windows tablet, Android, and iPhone. Features include GPS tracking, mapping with LiDAR/MbTiles, worksite management, fleet management, timesheet tracking, fuel management, delivery tracking, and real-time cloud synchronization.
- **MobileLogix**: Mobile field application for Android with AI-powered forestry chatbot, voice reading, automatic report generation, GPS Bluetooth SPP, Material Design 3 interface, and multi-company management.
- **SyncLogix**: Real-time data synchronization engine between field devices and office, supporting cloud sync and offline Bluetooth sync.
- **TrackLogix**: Reforestation tracking application using connected smartwatches to automatically collect GPS data from tree planters, generating instant production reports without paperwork.
- **SIGLogix**: GIS integration tool for ArcMap/ArcGIS Pro with WFS publishing, symbology support (QGIS .qml, ArcMap .lyr, ArcGIS Pro .lyrx), and MbTiles creation.

## Services

- Complete forestry software solutions
- Rugged Windows and Android tablets for field use
- Custom software development for forestry operations
- GIS integration consulting

## Product Pages

- [ForestLogix](https://www.galogix.ca/en/forestlogix.html): Forestry operations management platform (desktop, tablet, mobile).
- [MobileLogix](https://www.galogix.ca/en/mobilelogix.html): Mobile field application with AI-powered forestry chatbot.
- [SyncLogix](https://www.galogix.ca/en/synclogix.html): Real-time data synchronization engine.
- [TrackLogix](https://www.galogix.ca/en/tracklogix.html): Reforestation tracking with connected smartwatches.
- [SIGLogix](https://www.galogix.ca/en/siglogix.html): GIS integration for ArcMap/ArcGIS Pro.
- [Products overview](https://www.galogix.ca/en/produits.html): All products at a glance.

## Notes

- The site is bilingual. French versions of every page are available by replacing `/en/` with `/fr/` in any URL above (e.g. https://www.galogix.ca/fr/forestlogix.html).
- A full list of pages is available in the sitemap: https://www.galogix.ca/sitemap.xml
